calendar.matters:
Petition For Recovery Of Real Property, For Cancellation Of Instrument And For Damages Including For Elder Abuse
Off Calendar Mar-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andy Tran for and with Harold McElroy (Petitioner).

Mr. Tran stated that he had receipts for the gargage door, for the hauling away of property, for the locks and for the plumbing fees. The Court approved $1,699.00 in damages and took the attorney's fees under submission. The Court canceled the rental agreement and indicated that the Conservatee lacked the capacity to enter into the lease agreement.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.
